caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a small red bowtie, glasses, and a distinctive silver, spiked wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous small, framed pictures. To his right, a clothing rack holds garments, including one with the text "LEE" visible. Overlaid on the lower left of the scene is a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Another instance of the "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo appears on the right side. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and subtly shifting his head and facial expressions, while his hands move slightly in front of him. The camera angle and the background remain static as he talks.
